data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce user decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Limits options on the interface to enhance user navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs large clickable areas for frequently accessed features.
data.technical_spec: Positioned key interactive elements within thumb reach on mobile UI.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Optimizes content in bite-sized chunks for easy information processing.
data.technical_spec: Employs playlists and series arrangements for logical content flow.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Maintains consistency with familiar web navigation structures.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes standard icons and menu placements across the platform.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances visual appeal to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates a clean and visually pleasing design.
